title: Victor Zakharov
text: Home * People * Victor Zakharov Victor Zakharov [1] Victor Zakharov , a Russian computer scientist holding a Ph.D. in CS from Lomonosov Moscow State University , entrepreneur, founder of ChessOK aka Convekta , head of its development, primary developer of Chess Assistant [2] and Aquarium [3] , and scientific secretary at the Institute of Informatics Problems of the Russian Academy of Sciences , Moscow [4] . Also affiliated with the Lomonosov Moscow State University, Victor Zakharov is along with Vladimir Makhnychev involved in generating the 7-men Lomonosov Tablebases [5] , using the Lomonosov Supercomputer . As of December 31, 2013, the tablebases are commercially available online through ChessOK products [6] .
